focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Yu and Jen discuss the realities of being a fighter, contrasting romanticized stories with strict rules and hardships; Jen expresses longing for freedom as she faces an arranged marriage, while Yu acknowledges her constraints.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jen, the governor's daughter, discusses martial life with Yu.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jen expresses longing for freedom while handling Li Mu Bai's sword and hears Yu's realistic account of a fighter's life.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Jen wants to experience freedom but faces an arranged marriage.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jen has heard Yu describe the rules and hardships of being a fighter, contrasting with her romanticized stories.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jen is dissatisfied with her impending arranged marriage.
evidence_quotes: Yu gently lays the sword, still in its sheath, in Jen's hands.
It must be exciting to be a fighter, to be totally free!
I'm getting married soon, but I haven't lived the life I want.

relation_updates: Builds rapport with Yu through dialogue
status_updates: Holds Li Mu Bai's sword, symbolizing attraction to martial world
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Jen romanticizes martial freedom but is socially constrained by her role and marriage prospects.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen expresses longing for freedom and love, while Yu Shu Lien shares her past engagement to Meng Si Zhao and unfulfilled love for Li Mu Bai, bonding with Jen like sisters before wishing her happiness in marriage.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Confides in Yu Shu Lien about her arranged marriage and desire for freedom.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Expresses dissatisfaction with the arranged marriage for her father's career and bonds with Yu Shu Lien as sisters.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To live freely and choose her own love.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has shared her feelings with Yu Shu Lien, but the arranged marriage remains in place.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Tension between her wish for personal freedom and the duty to marry for family benefit.
evidence_quotes: But to be free to live my own life, to choose whom I love... That is true happiness.
Don't distance us. From now on, let's be like sisters.

relation_updates: Forms sisterly bond with Yu Shu Lien
status_updates: Acknowledges arranged marriage is for father's career
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Privately expresses rebellious desires against societal norms in a trusted conversation.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen overpowers the Governess, revealing she surpassed her long ago and hid her skills out of fear; the Governess, realizing her limitations, exits defiantly.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jen confronts Jade Fox and demonstrates her superior martial skills.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jen overpowers Jade Fox in a brief fight, disabling her with a pressure point strike and revealing she concealed her skills for years.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Jen refuses to live as a thief and asserts her independence from Jade Fox.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jade Fox exits defiantly after being defeated, breaking the mentorship but leaving enmity.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jade Fox escapes and remains at large, posing a continued threat.
evidence_quotes: JEN I'll never live as a thief!
Jen presses her finger against one of the Governess's pressure points, disabling her.
I hid my skills so as not to hurt you.
Fox exits.

relation_updates: Breaks from master-disciple relationship with Jade Fox
status_updates: True martial superiority confirmed
Takes moral stand against criminal lifestyle
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Jen is morally opposed to crime and has hidden her true martial prowess.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen is startled by a noise as Lo sneaks in through the window, injuring himself on her sword. They reunite emotionally, with Lo admitting he was wrong to let her go and urging her to return to the desert for freedom and happiness. Jen questions if he's been searching for her all this time, leading to a flashback.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Reunited with former lover Lo
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo sneaks in through the window, is injured by her sword, and they reunite as he urges her to return to the desert for freedom.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: In Lo's arms, questioning his search for her, leading to a flashback.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether she will leave with Lo for the desert.
evidence_quotes: Lo opens the window and sneaks in -- right into the point of Jen's waiting sword.
JEN Lo? LO Jen!
Lo grabs her by the wrist.
JEN You've been looking for me all this time?

relation_updates: Romantic relationship with Lo rekindled
status_updates: Emotionally vulnerable with Lo
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Emotionally responsive to Lo's return and curious about his persistence.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen demands her comb back, stabs Lo with an arrow, leading to a violent tussle that turns passionate as Lo overpowers her.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Demands comb back from Lo and stabs him with an arrow.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Stabs Lo after demanding comb, leading to a tussle that turns passionate.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Retrieve her comb from Lo.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: In a passionate tussle with Lo, with violence shifting to foreplay.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Comb is not returned.
evidence_quotes: JEN Give it back.
Jen impulsively grabs an arrow and stabs Lo, drawing a little blood from his chest.
Finally, Lo gets on top of Jen, and the scuffling becomes more like foreplay.

relation_updates: Relationship with Lo shifts from adversarial to intimate
status_updates: Engaged in physical altercation that becomes passionate
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Impulsive and assertive, using violence to reclaim her comb, but conflict becomes intimate.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen and Lo share a heartfelt goodbye; she gives him her jade comb as a token, asking him to keep it safe until they reunite, with a bittersweet promise to hold him to it.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Giving jade comb to Lo during farewell
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Gives jade comb to Lo and asks him to keep it safe until they reunite
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To reunite with Lo and have the comb returned
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has given the jade comb to Lo and is parting ways with a promise of reunion
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Lo will return the comb as promised
evidence_quotes: Jen takes the jade comb out of her hair and presses it into his palm.
JEN Keep it safe. Return it to me when we are together again.
JEN (smiling painfully) If you don't, I'll come after you. And I won't let you off so easy.

relation_updates: Solidifies bond with Lo through exchange of personal item
status_updates: Loses possession of jade comb
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Emotionally attached to Lo, insists on the comb's return

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lo gives Jen a comb before leaving through the window; she hides it from a maid who investigates noise, claiming it was just a cat.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jen ending her relationship with Lo
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jen tearfully tells Lo their relationship is over and accepts a comb from him, which she later examines in secret.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jen has ended the relationship with Lo and keeps the comb as a hidden token.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jen's lingering attachment to Lo and her impending marriage.
evidence_quotes: JEN (through her tears) Don't ever come back.
LO So it's over? Jen pauses. JEN Yes.
Jen opens up her palm; gasping, she sees the comb that Lo has given her.

relation_updates: Ends romantic relationship with Lo
Keeps comb as secret token
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Jen is tearful and conflicted, pushing Lo away but holding onto the comb he gave her.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Te discovers an empty sword case, frustrated by repeated thefts. Bo reports Jen has fled, and Yu seeks Te's help to find her. Li offers to handle the matter.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Runaway bride reported missing
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jen has fled her wedding, as reported by Bo, with the chamber found empty.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Missing and sought by Governor Yu with assistance from Te.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Her safety and whereabouts are unknown.
evidence_quotes: Jen has run away!
Gou found the wedding chamber empty.
He wants to find her, and keep her from harm.

status_updates: Has fled the wedding
Now a runaway bride
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A bride who has fled her wedding.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen, angered by the name Gou, declares herself the Invincible Sword Goddess and attacks with the Green Destiny, defeating fighters and challenging masters like Southern Crane, leaving destruction in her wake.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Self-declared Invincible Sword Goddess wielding Green Destiny
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Attacks multiple martial artists in the restaurant with Green Destiny after declaring herself and reacting angrily to the name Gou
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To defeat major martial arts masters like Southern Crane and Li Mu Bai and challenge schools like Wudan
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has defeated several challengers and left destruction in the restaurant
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Limited money remaining and ongoing conflicts with martial artists
evidence_quotes: JEN Who am I? I am... I am the Invincible Sword Goddess. Armed with the Incredible... Green Destiny.

relation_updates: Hostile to multiple martial artists
Open contempt for traditions
status_updates: Publicly wielding Green Destiny
Self-declared goddess
Seeking conflict
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Arrogant and violent, using the sword to dominate opponents

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen accuses Yu of betrayal, reveals theft of the sword; Yu condemns Jen's ingratitude, disowns her; Jen defies Yu, jumps out as Yu demands she drop the sword.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jen confronts Yu Shu Lien, accuses her of betrayal, and escapes with the sword.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jen's sisterly bond with Yu breaks after accusing her of setting her up; she confirms stealing the sword and flees.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To escape Yu and avoid being forced back to her parents.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has jumped out of Yu's room, disowned by Yu, and is a confirmed fugitive with the sword.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Her relationship with Lo and Li Mu Bai's plans remain unresolved.
evidence_quotes: JEN You're working together to set me up! I'm leaving!
JEN What do I care? You were never a real friend anyway. But I wonder, how long could you last as my enemy?
Jen jumps out.

relation_updates: Broken sisterly bond with Yu
Rejects parental authority
status_updates: Confirmed sword thief
Rejects marriage
Fugitive
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Defiant and rebellious, rejecting Yu's advice and disowning her as a sister.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jade Fox dies after revealing Jen as her target. Jen identifies Purple Yin poison in Li; no antidote exists, but she knows the formula. Yu sends Jen with her comb to Mrs. Wu for help while Li fights to survive.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Person who knows the antidote formula and is sent to fetch help
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Identifies Purple Yin poison and reveals she knows the antidote formula, then agrees to get ingredients
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Fetch ingredients and prepare antidote to save Li Mu Bai
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Departing to Mrs. Wu's compound with Yu's comb for assistance
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the antidote can be prepared in time to save Li Mu Bai
evidence_quotes: JEN Spare your energy. I'll be back!

relation_updates: Li trusts her to find antidote
Yu entrusts her with horse and comb
status_updates: Becomes active agent on rescue mission
Identified as Jade Fox's target
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Actively assisting in Li Mu Bai's rescue after receiving help

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lo reunites with Jen on a bridge; she recalls a legend about wishes and leaps into the clouds, seemingly carried away safely, leaving Lo tearful yet smiling as he wishes to return to the desert together.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jen prompting Lo to make a wish and leaping into the clouds
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jen asks Lo if he remembers a legend, prompts him to make a wish, and then leaps into the clouds, disappearing.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jen disappears into the clouds, leaving Lo standing with a smile and tears.
evidence_quotes: JEN Make a wish, Lo.
Jen smiles, turns, and leaps into the clouds.
They seem to catch her gently, before she disappears into them.

relation_updates: Final interaction with Lo involves shared legend
status_updates: Disappears into the clouds, possibly transcending
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Jen, who references a legend and vanishes into the clouds after prompting a wish.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Jen begins as a constrained governor's daughter longing for freedom, develops hidden martial skills, and rebels against her arranged marriage. Her journey involves a tumultuous relationship with Lo in the desert, a destructive rampage as a self-proclaimed sword goddess, and a breakdown leading to redemption. Ultimately, she is spared by Yu Shu Lien, reunites with Lo, but then mysteriously disappears, leaving her fate ambiguous.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bandits led by Lo attack a caravan, killing guards. Lo takes a comb from Jen, who escapes the carriage but the bandits flee on horseback.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bandit leader Dark Cloud attacking a caravan
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo leads bandits in an attack on the caravan, takes Jen's comb, and is identified as Dark Cloud.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To raid the caravan and obtain Jen's comb.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Bandits flee on horseback with the comb; Jen escapes the carriage and arms herself with a lance.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jen's armed stance after the bandits escape.
evidence_quotes: Lo and a group of armed bandits descend on the caravan.
Lo approaches the carriage and grabs the comb from Jen's hand.
LO Let's go!

relation_updates: Initiates hostile conflict with Jen
Reveals bandit identity as Dark Cloud
status_updates: Active as bandit leader Dark Cloud
In possession of Jen's comb after the attack

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen, initially resistant, accepts Lo's offer to bathe using his brought water, wears his clean clothes, and smiles while listening to his off-key singing during the bath.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Caretaker offering bath and clean clothes
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo reveals a makeshift bathroom, offers fresh water for bathing and clean clothes, and Jen accepts by nodding and bathing while he sings.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jen bathes and smiles, indicating reduced hostility.
evidence_quotes: Jen nods and the bandit releases her.
Jen smiles.

relation_updates: Provides caretaking to Jen
Relationship softens as Jen accepts help

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen demands her comb back, stabs Lo with an arrow, leading to a violent tussle that turns passionate as Lo overpowers her.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Bandit leader disputing comb ownership with Jen
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo's argument with Jen over a comb escalates to violence when she stabs him, leading to a physical fight that turns into intimate contact.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Refusing to return the comb to assert autonomy
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: In intimate physical contact with Jen after overpowering her
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ownership of the comb remains disputed
evidence_quotes: LO I don't take orders from anyone.
Jen impulsively grabs an arrow and stabs Lo, drawing a little blood from his chest.
Finally, Lo gets on top of Jen, and the scuffling becomes more like foreplay.

relation_updates: Relationship with Jen shifts from adversarial to intimate
status_updates: Sustains minor stab wound from Jen
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Defiant and humorous bandit leader

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lo, once an orphaned bandit seeking shooting stars, now claims to have found the brightest star, asserting his transformation from a boy into a man with purpose and fulfillment.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Lo shares his orphan past and bandit motivations with Jen in a bath.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo discloses he is an orphan, explains the Dark Cloud gang is a survival facade, and declares Jen as his 'brightest star'.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To have found purpose in Jen, as indicated by his declaration.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lo identifies himself as a man who has found his brightest star, referring to Jen.
evidence_quotes: When I was a boy, one night, I saw a thousand shooting stars.
I'm an orphan. I used to look for stars alone.
All that Dark Cloud stuff is just to scare people and make my life easier.
I am a man. And now I've found the brightest star of all.

relation_updates: Deepens intimacy through vulnerable self-disclosure to Jen
status_updates: Reveals Dark Cloud gang reputation is manufactured for survival
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A man who contrasts his orphan past with his current found purpose.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lo declares his love for Jen, vowing to earn her parents' respect and fulfill their legend by leaping from the mountain, believing faith can make wishes come true.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Lover vowing commitment and referencing a faith-based legend
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo informs Jen that her father's men are searching for them, declares his love and desire for her to be with him forever, vows to earn her parents' respect, and tells a legend about jumping from a mountain to have wishes granted through faith.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To secure Jen's commitment and assure her of their future by promising to earn her parents' respect and invoking a legend of faith.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lo has expressed his commitment to Jen, and they remain at the cliff with the search party nearby.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Lo will attempt the mountain leap from the legend and if faith can overcome the ongoing pursuit.
evidence_quotes: LO Your father's men are still looking for you. They're still out there, circling closer.
Jen... I want you to be mine forever. I will make my mark on the world. I will earn your parents' respect.
We have a legend. Anyone who dares to jump from the mountain, God will grant his wish.
If you believe, it will happen. The elders say, "A faithful heart makes wishes come true."

relation_updates: Lo declares love and commitment to Jen
Lo acknowledges pursuit by Jen's father's men as personal trouble
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A committed lover who believes in faith and legends to overcome obstacles.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen and Lo share a heartfelt goodbye; she gives him her jade comb as a token, asking him to keep it safe until they reunite, with a bittersweet promise to hold him to it.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Receiver of Jen's jade comb with instructions for safekeeping
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo is given Jen's jade comb and told to keep it safe until they reunite; he agrees to do so.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To keep the comb safe and return it to Jen when they are together again.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lo possesses Jen's jade comb and has promised to safeguard it for their future reunion.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The obligation to return the comb as promised upon reunion.
evidence_quotes: Jen takes the jade comb out of her hair and presses it into his palm.
JEN Keep it safe. Return it to me when we are together again.
LO I will.

relation_updates: Jen gives Lo her jade comb as a token of love and future reunion
status_updates: Lo now possesses Jen's jade comb

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lo gives Jen a comb before leaving through the window; she hides it from a maid who investigates noise, claiming it was just a cat.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Rejected lover giving a comb before escaping through the window
timeline_nodes.salient_development: After Jen tells him not to come back, Lo gives her a comb and flees her room through the window.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lo has exited through the window, leaving Jen with the comb he thrust into her hand.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The significance of the comb and where Lo goes after fleeing.
evidence_quotes: JEN (through her tears) Don't ever come back.
Lo thrusts a small object in her hand.
Jen opens up her palm; gasping, she sees the comb that Lo has given her.

relation_updates: Jen verbally ends relationship with Lo
Lo gives Jen a comb despite her rejection
status_updates: Lo flees Jen's room through window
Lo is in Peking

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lo, dejected and hunted, is persuaded by Yu and Li to seek refuge in Wudan with a letter of introduction, reigniting his hope to reunite with the woman he loves.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Dejected lover persuaded to seek refuge in Wudan
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo, dejected and hunted, agrees to go to Wudan after Li Mu Bai offers an introduction and Yu persuades him to seek safety.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To wait in Wudan for news about Jen
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has agreed to seek refuge in Wudan
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether he will successfully reunite with Jen
evidence_quotes: Lo sits dejectedly
She's mine.
All right.

Romantic claim on Jen asserted
status_updates: Agreed to seek refuge in Wudan
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Asserts 'She's mine' indicating a romantic claim on Jen

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen climbs to the temple, reaches the gate, and greets Lo, who runs to her.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Welcoming partner at the temple gate
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo is at the temple gate and runs to Jen when she arrives.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To meet Jen
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lo is with Jen at the temple
evidence_quotes: and sees Lo standing there
He runs to her.
She greets him.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen and Lo engage in a sexual encounter.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Intimate partner
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo and Jen have a sexual encounter at the Wu Tan Temple.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lo has become physically intimate with Jen.
evidence_quotes: Jen and Lo make love.

relation_updates: Lo and Jen become intimate

timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo wakes up to find the jade comb on the pillow beside him, Jen gone.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lo reunites with Jen on a bridge; she recalls a legend about wishes and leaps into the clouds, seemingly carried away safely, leaving Lo tearful yet smiling as he wishes to return to the desert together.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Wishful lover
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lo makes a wish to return to the desert with Jen and watches her leap into the clouds, reacting with a smile and tears.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lo remains standing on the bridge alone, smiling with tears after Jen disappears into the clouds.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Lo's wish to be back in the desert with Jen will come true.

LO (closing his eyes) To be back in the desert, together again.
Lo remains standing, a smile on his face, tears rolling down his cheeks.

Lo's physical relationship with Jen ends

Lo experiences mixed emotional acceptance

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Lo, as bandit leader Dark Cloud, initiates conflict with Jen by attacking her caravan and taking her comb. Their relationship evolves through desert chases, intimate moments in a cave where Lo reveals his past and declares love, and a token exchange of a jade comb. After a rejection in Peking, Lo seeks refuge in Wudan, reunites with Jen, shares intimacy, but she leaves him with the comb. He makes a wish for their future as she departs into the clouds.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Yu, a woman in her 30s, packs for a convoy when Aunt Wu arrives abruptly, announcing Li Mu Bai's presence.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Yu packing for convoy when interrupted by Aunt Wu's announcement
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Aunt Wu bursts in and announces Li Mu Bai's arrival while Yu is packing.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Yu learns of Li Mu Bai's arrival from Aunt Wu.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How Yu will respond to Li Mu Bai's arrival.
evidence_quotes: wrapping a few small items in a linen wrapper
Li Mu Bai is here!

relation_updates: Aunt Wu informs Yu of Li Mu Bai's presence
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Duty-bound convoy leader

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Li, unable to let go of past sorrow, decides to entrust the Green Destiny Sword to Sir Te, seeking redemption for his master's death, while considering joining Yu in Peking after visiting his master's grave.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Yu hosts Li Mu Bai, learns of his decision to give up the Green Destiny Sword, and invites him to accompany her to Peking.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Yu invites Li Mu Bai to join her convoy to Peking after he reveals his plan to entrust the sword to Sir Te.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To deliver the convoy to Peking with Li Mu Bai's possible accompaniment.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Yu has invited Li Mu Bai to accompany her to Peking and stated she will wait for him there after he visits his master's grave.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Li Mu Bai will accept Yu's invitation and resolve his inner conflict about avenging his master.
evidence_quotes: Come with me to Peking. You can give the sword to Sir Te yourself. It'll be just like old times.
Join me once you have finished. I can wait for you in Peking.
Mu Bai...It's been too long.
I don't understand. How can you part with it? It has always been with you.

relation_updates: Yu reconnects with Li Mu Bai after a long separation
Yu offers support and companionship to Li Mu Bai
status_updates: Yu is the leader of a Sun Security convoy to Peking
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Supportive and patient companion, as shown by her invitation and willingness to wait.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Sir Te urges Yu to confront her feelings for Li Mu Bai, suggesting his sword's retirement may be a sign, and criticizes their emotional hesitation despite their bond.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Yu presents Li Mu Bai's sword to Sir Te and is confronted about her unspoken feelings for Li Mu Bai.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Sir Te openly states he knows about Yu and Li Mu Bai's feelings and criticizes their emotional hesitation, prompting Yu to deny they are cowards.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Yu is aware her feelings for Li Mu Bai are known to Sir Te and has been invited to stay overnight as his guest.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The unspoken romantic tension between Yu and Li Mu Bai remains unresolved.
evidence_quotes: Yu presents the sword to Sir Te.
YU I beg your pardon. Li Mu Bai and I aren't cowards.
SIR TE Please do not be such a stranger. You'll stay the night as my guest.

relation_updates: Sir Te openly references and criticizes Yu's unacknowledged feelings for Li Mu Bai
Yu denies that she and Li Mu Bai are cowards in matters of emotion
status_updates: Yu is invited to stay overnight as Sir Te's guest
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Defensive when her emotional courage is questioned.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Yu and Jen discuss the realities of being a fighter, contrasting romanticized stories with strict rules and hardships; Jen expresses longing for freedom as she faces an arranged marriage, while Yu acknowledges her constraints.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Fighter explaining practical realities and rules to Jen
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Yu demonstrates her fighter experience by handling the sword and stating fighter rules, while observing Jen's constrained situation.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Yu has shared her perspective on fighter life and acknowledged Jen's impending marriage.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jen's arranged marriage and desire for freedom
evidence_quotes: YU Fighters have rules too: friendship, trust, integrity... Without rules, we wouldn't survive for long.
YU Yes, I am. But I prefer the machete. Certain moves, however, call for a sword.
Yu studies Jen. The room falls silent for a moment.
YU Beautiful but dangerous. Once you see it tainted with blood, its beauty is hard to admire.

relation_updates: Establishes trust-based guidance relationship with Jen
Confirms friendship with Li Mu Bai
status_updates: Entrusted with Li Mu Bai's ceremonial sword
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Experienced fighter who values rules and practical hardships

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 17、EXT./INT. INSIDE AND OUTSIDE OF TE'S STUDY - NIGHT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A masked thief steals a sword, evades Bo, and escapes over rooftops as alarms sound and people, including Yu Shu Lien, respond.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Responder to theft alarm
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Yu rushes outside with others after the alarm sounds for the stolen sword.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Yu is in the courtyard among the alerted crowd.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Recovery of the stolen sword and identification of the thief.
evidence_quotes: People rush outside, Yu Shu Lien among them.

status_updates: Responds to alarm of sword theft
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Alerted responder

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Yu confronts a thief on a rooftop who deflects her attack and flees. She pursues, recognizing Wudan training, and resumes combat with rapid strikes.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Confronting hooded thief on rooftop
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Yu recognizes the thief's Wudan training during the confrontation.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Retrieve the stolen sword
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Thief leaps to another rooftop; Yu catches up and resumes attacking.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Thief still has the sword and is evading capture.
evidence_quotes: YU Return the sword, and I'll let you go.
Yu attacks, but the figure repels her.
YU You've been trained at Wudan?
The figure answers by leaping to another rooftop. Yu catches up, and resumes her attack with a relentless series of lightning-quick blows.

relation_updates: Adversarial relation with Hooded Figure
status_updates: On rooftop in pursuit
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Skilled combatant and investigator

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen expresses longing for freedom and love, while Yu Shu Lien shares her past engagement to Meng Si Zhao and unfulfilled love for Li Mu Bai, bonding with Jen like sisters before wishing her happiness in marriage.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Yu visits Jen and shares her personal history about duty and love.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Yu tells Jen about her deceased fiancé Meng Si Zhao and her restrained feelings for Li Mu Bai, and Jen proposes they be like sisters.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To relate to Jen's feelings by sharing her own experiences with duty and unfulfilled desire for freedom.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jen and Yu have agreed to a sisterly bond, and Yu has wished Jen happiness in her upcoming marriage.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Yu's desire for freedom remains unfulfilled as she is bound by duty.
evidence_quotes: His name was Meng Si Zhao. He was a brother to Li Mu Bai by oath. One day, while in battle, he was killed by the sword of Li Mu Bai's enemy.
After, Li Mu Bai and I went through a lot together. Our feelings for each other grew stronger. But how could we dishonor Meng's memory?
So the freedom you talk about, I too desire it. But I have never tasted it.
Then as a sister, let me wish you happiness in your marriage.

relation_updates: Forms sisterly bond with Jen
Reveals past engagement to Meng Si Zhao
Confirms emotional bond with Li Mu Bai
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Yu prioritizes loyalty and duty over personal desires.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Yu enters and finds Sir Te with a man who turns out to be Li Mu Bai, revealed to Shu Lien.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Yu enters Te's study and finds Li Mu Bai there.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Yu discovers Li Mu Bai is present in the room.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Yu has seen Li Mu Bai in Te's study.
evidence_quotes: Yu is ushered into the room,
to discover Sir Te talking to another man, whose back is to her.
it's Li Mu Bai.

relation_updates: Reunited with Li Mu Bai

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Li and Yu confess their feelings amid reflections on repression and peace; Li acknowledges his desire to be with Yu, finding solace in their connection despite past troubles.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Yu asserting the reality of her feelings to Li
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Yu challenges Li's view of impermanence by insisting on the reality of her hand, leading Li to acknowledge his feelings and take her hand.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Li expresses peace in being with Yu, and their hands are physically connected.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Tension between their romantic feelings and the troubles of Giang Hu.
evidence_quotes: YU Have some tea.
As Yu passes the cup to Li, their fingers touch.
YU Not everything is an illusion. My hand... wasn't that real?
Li takes Yu's hand and presses it to his face.

relation_updates: Yu and Li's relationship deepens into acknowledged romance
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Assertive in confronting Li's repression of feelings

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jen accuses Yu of betrayal, reveals theft of the sword; Yu condemns Jen's ingratitude, disowns her; Jen defies Yu, jumps out as Yu demands she drop the sword.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Yu, protector and former sister figure to Jen
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Yu accuses Jen of stealing the sword, declares she is no longer her sister, and Jen jumps out after defying her.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jen escapes with the sword, and Yu severs their sisterly bond.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jen retains the stolen sword and has become an adversary to Yu.
evidence_quotes: JEN What do I care? You were never a real friend anyway. But I wonder, how long could you last as my enemy?
YU Put the sword down! Jen jumps out.

relation_updates: Disowns Jen as sister
Becomes adversarial with Jen
status_updates: Reveals she knew about the sword theft
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Yu shows firm principles by disowning Jen after betrayal and demanding the sword's return.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jade Fox dies after revealing Jen as her target. Jen identifies Purple Yin poison in Li; no antidote exists, but she knows the formula. Yu sends Jen with her comb to Mrs. Wu for help while Li fights to survive.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Yu manages the crisis after Li Mu Bai is poisoned, coordinating with Jen to secure an antidote.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Yu shifts from questioning Jen to trusting her with antidote preparation, giving her own comb to seek help from Mrs. Wu.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Save Li Mu Bai from Purple Yin poison.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jen is sent to Mrs. Wu with Yu's comb for antidote ingredients, while Yu stays with Li Mu Bai.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Li Mu Bai's survival depends on Jen returning with the antidote in time.
evidence_quotes: YU What happened?
YU You can't die! Tell us what poison you used! You can't die! Tell us the antidote! You can't let Li Mu Bai die!
YU (takes the comb from her hair) Take my horse and go to the compound. Give this to Mrs. Wu. She'll help you. Hurry!

relation_updates: Temporary alliance with Jen to save Li Mu Bai
Demonstrates trust in Jen by giving personal token (comb)
status_updates: Actively involved in crisis management
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Acts urgently in crisis, shows trust by providing personal token.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Li dies in Yu's arms; Yu spares Jen, sends Bo with Green Destiny to Sir Te, and tells Jen to go to Wudan Mountain to meet Lo, urging her to stay true to herself.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Manages aftermath of Li's death by sparing Jen and handling sword return
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Yu sees Li dead, spares Jen, gives Green Destiny to Bo for return to Sir Te, and tells Jen to go to Wudan Mountain and be true to herself.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Return Green Destiny to Sir Te and send Jen to Wudan Mountain
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Yu has released Li's body, spared Jen, and entrusted sword return to Bo
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Jen will adhere to Yu's advice to be true to herself
evidence_quotes: Yu slowly releases Li's stiff fingers -- he is dead.
Yu raises the sword, but doesn't kill her.
YU Bo... please take this sword back to Sir Te.

relation_updates: Spares Jen, showing mercy
Entrusts Bo with returning Green Destiny to Sir Te
status_updates: Li is dead
Yu relinquishes possession of the sword
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Merciful in sparing Jen and resolute in fulfilling post-death responsibilities

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Yu Shu Lien, a disciplined security leader, reconnects with Li Mu Bai and becomes embroiled in the theft of his ceremonial sword. She mentors the young Jen, confronts her unspoken feelings for Li, and navigates conflicts with Jade Fox and Jen. After Li Mu Bai's death, Yu resolves the sword's fate and advises Jen to pursue her own path.
